name: Mahdi Fazaldin
description: Mahdi is a Teenage (Baaligh), Self-taught Lecturer who gives Lectures on his own personal channel and Jamaat Abi Sibtayn; He is also the Vice President of Jamaat Abi Sibtayn.

name: Jamaal Hussein
description: Jamaal is a Non-Bāligh, Self-taught Lecturer who gives Lectures on Jamaat Abi Sibtayn; He is also the President of Jamaat Abi Sibtayn.
